recent_player_actions.text: Galinor approaches the runner. "3 Silver for stew, and 3 for tales of this city. I may be new, but I'm here to help."
Galinor takes a moment to consider what the runner said...
"Anything else I should know about before taking my leave?"

frontier_gate.last_player_action_text: "Anything else I should know about before taking my leave?"

recent_contextual_leads.subject: refugees and traders alike huddle
recent_contextual_leads.position: under eaves, their muffled conversations mixing with the persistent drumming of rainfall

recent_contextual_leads.subject: guards survey the crowd with tense vigilance, while a tavern runner shouts, offering steaming bowls of stew amidst the chaos

topic:miss.last_answer: The tavern runner looks at Galinor with a mix of eagerness and urgency. "You’ve got a mind for this place, I can tell. Lirael’s your best bet for news that can make a difference around here. But many are watching, so tread carefully—trust nobody too easily."

topic:anyth_before_else.last_answer: The tavern runner leans in closer, lowering his voice. “It’s not just the patrol that’s troubling the folk around here. There’s word that something’s been stirring near the old milestone. Best be careful if you choose to investigate—more than just wildlife is lurking about.”
topic:anyth_before_else.last_player_input: "Anything else I should know about before taking my leave?"

topic_pressure_current.player_text: "Anything else I should know about before taking my leave?"
